title: lib/db
description:
This directory contains classes for reading data from a database using MapReduce.

The classes in this directory collaborate to read data from a database table and emit records as key-value pairs.

The architectural role of this directory is to provide a high-level interface for reading data from a database and handling the distributed processing of the data.

The classes in this directory use the Apache Hadoop MapReduce framework and the Apache Hadoop classification library.
